summary: Start M7-SYSTEMIC-INTERACTION-VALIDATION-001 as the next systemic interaction recovery task after M7-MAP-DECISION-SURFACE-SYNC-001 closed through PR #220. This task must validate the repaired first viewport, District 1 troop obligation path, appointment preview/confirmation feedback, map/task/inspector synchronization, screenshot evidence, and console cleanliness before M7 content-lock reconsideration can reopen. This validation does not approve formal M7 content lock.

tests_run.command: git status --short --branch; git branch --show-current; git rev-parse HEAD; git rev-parse origin/main
tests_run.result: PASS; local main and origin/main were synchronized at 88ad6146a9d47bf98e3643a218bce6fc8b17dccd before creating the validation branch.

decisions.decision: Start M7-SYSTEMIC-INTERACTION-VALIDATION-001 immediately after M7-MAP-DECISION-SURFACE-SYNC-001 closure entered main.
This task may determine whether product-owner content-lock reconsideration can reopen, but it cannot approve formal M7 content lock.
No sim-core, protocol, save-format, content-source, Electron, server, telemetry, final art, or manual node battle scope is authorized.

risks.summary: If screenshot/manual-smoke validation still shows player confusion, the recovery chain must request changes instead of reopening content-lock reconsideration.

requested_action: Run the systemic interaction recovery validation, capture required screenshot/manual-smoke evidence, and route to independent QA review.
